mentions.note: Volatility matching 2011 peak (preceded 50% correction); RSI in mid-90s; broken multi-decade trendline at 2900; hit 5100 yesterday; technical setup suggests potential trend reversal or blowoff.

Gold trading as speculative asset, not hedge. Down 14% Feb-March amid inflation fears while stocks fell 8%. Seasonal and 18-month cycle charts scream pullback through June. Consider taking profits on big gains.
Optional inflation hedge for younger investors rebuilding after major cash event; alternative to Bitcoin for portfolio insurance.
Simple, low-cost gold ETF; exception to general skepticism toward sector-focused and actively trading ETFs.
